summary: Comprehensive testing of Cognitive Offloading Research Tool completed. Backend APIs working excellently (97.4% success), frontend interfaces functional with minor UI interaction issues on demographics form

minor_issues.impact: Minor - weekly reports export not available

ui_bugs.issue: Radio button selection for memory self-rating has interaction issues - overlay intercepting clicks

passed_tests: POST /api/participants with demographics - demographics saved to MongoDB verified
POST /api/sessions/{id}/recall-probe with response_time_ms - exact timing captured
Researcher login with password 'pmresearch2026' - authentication working
Researcher dashboard showing offloading comparison chart - thesis feature visible
Experiment creation with scaffolded_increase_factor and faded_opacity_decay - backend supports both
Analytics page accessible with strategy comparison data
Scaffolded and Faded strategy experiments created successfully via API
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix radio button interaction issue in demographics form - overlay is preventing clicks on memory rating selection. The wrapper div is intercepting pointer events.
success_percentage: Backend: 97.4% (37/38 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (major flows working, minor UI issue)
